metadata.title: 🔬 SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER - SCIENTIFIC ROASTING SESSION

executive_summary.verdict: MIXED BAG OF ENGINEERING DECISIONS - Some impressive, some horrifying
executive_summary.overall_quality: 65% - Above average but with concerning anti-patterns
executive_summary.recommendation: Immediate refactoring needed for 40% of commands

complexity_scores.methodology: CLAUDE.md scoring: Direct=1, Class=+2, Interface=+1, Pattern=+3, Config=+2

analyze-project-architecture.md.savage_judgment: DECENT CONCEPT, EXECUTION IS ACADEMIC MASTURBATION. Has 15 thinking blocks for what could be 3 Bash commands. Complexity score of 8 when CLAUDE.md demands <5. This isn't 'intelligent', it's overthinking with a PhD.
objective_flaws: 274 lines for project analysis is bloated
Sequential thinking tool dependency adds fragility
redeeming_qualities: Actually structured for real project discovery
analyze-project-architecture.md.recommendation: Cut 70% of thinking theater. Use glob, grep, read. Done.

ultrathink-pure-xml.md.savage_judgment: HOLY COMPLEXITY BATMAN! 472 lines of pure XML theater for 'thinking'. Complexity score of 12 - that's 140% OVER the limit. This isn't ULTRATHINK, it's ULTRA-OVERTHINK. You've created a confidence-tracking bureaucracy that would make government agencies jealous.
objective_flaws: WORST complexity violation: 140% over CLAUDE.md limit
Confidence tracking adds zero measurable value
Claims 'fastest response' while being most verbose
ultrathink-pure-xml.md.recommendation: Delete 80% of XML ceremony. Keep 3-phase structure. Your 'minimal' approach needs a dictionary.

adhd-morning-assistant.md.savage_judgment: FINALLY, SOMEONE WHO GETS IT! This actually solves real problems for real humans. Complexity score of 6 is only 20% over (almost acceptable). Has genuine value propositions and measurable outcomes. This is what happens when engineering meets actual user needs.
adhd-morning-assistant.md.recommendation: Minor cleanup needed. This is how you build useful tools.

java-test-driven-development.md.savage_judgment: TDD WITH THINKING BLOCKS - because apparently writing tests first wasn't methodical enough! 460 lines to explain RED-GREEN-REFACTOR. Complexity score of 7 (40% over limit). Has solid examples but drowns them in meta-cognitive naval gazing.
objective_flaws: 460 lines for TDD methodology is excessive
java-test-driven-development.md.recommendation: Extract examples into separate reference. Cut philosophical thinking by 60%.

java-rapid-implementation.md.savage_judgment: RAPID IMPLEMENTATION WITH 250 LINES OF PLANNING! Complexity score of 9 (80% over limit). Claims 'rapid' but has 8 thinking checkpoints before writing any code. This is like GPS that recalculates the route for 5 minutes before moving.
java-rapid-implementation.md.recommendation: Rename to 'java-slow-deliberation'. For rapid, use: check exists -> write code -> done.

thinking_theater.description: Excessive meta-cognitive commentary that adds no functional value

complexity_inflation.description: All commands violate CLAUDE.md complexity < 5 rule

xml_ceremony.description: Unnecessary XML structure for simple operations

rapid_planning_paradox.description: Commands claiming speed while adding planning overhead

problem_focused_design.description: Actually solves real user problems with measurable outcomes

error_recovery.description: Most commands include error handling strategies

maintenance_burden.total_maintenance_debt: Estimated 40 hours to bring to CLAUDE.md compliance

immediate_actions: 🚨 CRITICAL: All commands violate complexity < 5 rule - immediate refactoring required
🔪 Cut 60-80% of thinking theater - keep functional logic only

specific_fixes.ultrathink-pure-xml.md: DELETE 400 lines. Keep 3-phase structure, remove XML ceremony
specific_fixes.java-rapid-implementation.md: RENAME to java-deliberate-implementation OR cut to 50 lines
specific_fixes.analyze-project-architecture.md: Replace thinking blocks with direct tool usage
specific_fixes.java-test-driven-development.md: Extract examples to reference, cut philosophy
specific_fixes.adhd-morning-assistant.md: Minor cleanup - this one almost works

architecture_changes: Implement complexity scoring in command templates
Add CLAUDE.md compliance checks to CI/CD
Standardize on functional patterns over thinking patterns

final_verdict.summary: Engineering team has good intentions but poor execution discipline
final_verdict.biggest_issue: 100% complexity rule violations show systematic failure
final_verdict.best_practice: adhd-morning-assistant.md shows how to build valuable tools
final_verdict.action_required: Immediate refactoring of 4 out of 5 commands
